title: chthonocephalus spathulatus
intro: Chthonocephalus spathulatus, also known as the desert button or button daisy, is a small shrub-like plant native to the deserts of Australia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be useful in treating various skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Chthonocephalus spathulatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against bacterial infections. Chthonocephalus spathulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
